 {"id":"bd-7fe8","title":"Fix linting error in migrate.go","description":"Linter reports error:
```
cmd/bd/migrate.go:647:37: cleanupWALFiles - result 0 (error) is always nil (unparam)
```

The `cleanupWALFiles` function always returns nil, so the error return type should be removed or the function should actually return errors when appropriate.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"chore","created_at":"2025-11-02T09:29:37.279747-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-02T09:46:52.18793-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-02T09:46:52.18793-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-7fe8","depends_on_id":"bd-1231","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-11-02T09:29:37.280881-08:00","created_by":"stevey"}]}
 {"id":"bd-7h5","title":"Add pinned field to issue schema","description":"Add boolean 'pinned' field to the issue schema. When true, the issue is marked as a persistent context marker that should not be treated as a work item.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-18T23:33:26.767247-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-19T00:08:59.854605-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-19T00:08:59.854605-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-7h5","depends_on_id":"bd-0vg","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-18T23:33:55.98635-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"bd-7h7","title":"bd init should stop running daemon to avoid stale cache","description":"When running bd init, any running daemon continues with stale cached data, causing bd stats and other commands to show old counts.

Repro:
1. Have daemon running with 788 issues cached
2. Clean JSONL to 128 issues, delete db, run bd init
3. bd stats still shows 788 (daemon cache)
4. Must manually run bd daemon --stop

Fix: bd init should automatically stop any running daemon before reinitializing.","status":"tombstone","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-16T13:26:47.117226-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-17T16:11:17.070763-08:00","deleted_at":"2025-12-17T16:11:17.070763-08:00","deleted_by":"batch delete","delete_reason":"batch delete","original_type":"bug"}

 {"id":"bd-7kua","title":"Reduce sync rounds in multiclone tests","description":"Analyze and reduce the number of sync rounds in hash multiclone tests.

Current state:
- TestHashIDs_MultiCloneConverge: 1 round of syncs across 3 clones
- TestHashIDs_IdenticalContentDedup: 2 rounds across 2 clones

Investigation needed:
- Profile to see how much time each sync takes
- Determine minimum rounds needed for convergence
- Consider making rounds configurable via env var

 {"id":"bd-7l27","title":"Integrate migration detection into bd doctor","description":"Multiple migration commands (migrate_hash_ids.go, migrate_issues.go, migrate_sync.go, migrate_tombstones.go, migrate.go) have TODOs suggesting integration into 'bd doctor' for automatic migration detection. This would allow bd doctor to detect when migrations are needed and suggest running them.

 {"id":"bd-7l67","title":"Add bd state and bd set-state helper commands","description":"Convenience commands for the labels-as-state pattern documented in LABELS.md.

`bd state <role> <dimension>` - Query the current value of a state dimension
Example: bd state witness-alpha patrol → outputs: active

`bd set-state <role> <dimension>=<value> [--reason "..."]` - Atomically creates an event bead and updates the label
Example: bd set-state witness-alpha patrol=muted --reason "Investigating stuck polecat"

This would combine the manual steps:
1. bd create "<reason>" -t event --parent <role>
2. bd label remove <role> <dimension>:<old-value>
3. bd label add <role> <dimension>:<new-value>

Into a single atomic operation.

Discovered from: bd-31ae","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-30T15:46:40.679911-08:00","created_by":"stevey","updated_at":"2025-12-30T15:56:44.713687-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T15:56:44.713687-08:00","close_reason":"Implemented bd state and bd set-state commands with tests and documentation","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-7l67","depends_on_id":"bd-31ae","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2025-12-30T15:46:50.184553-08:00","created_by":"stevey"}]}

 {"id":"bd-bdhn","title":"bd message: Add input validation for --importance flag","description":"The --importance flag accepts any string without validation, leading to confusing server errors.

**Location:** cmd/bd/message.go:256-258

**Fix:**
- Add flag validation for: low, normal, high, urgent
- Add shell completion support
- Validate in runMessageSend before sending

**Impact:** Better UX, prevents confusing errors","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-11-08T12:54:26.43027-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-08T12:57:59.65367-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-08T12:57:59.65367-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-bdhn","depends_on_id":"bd-6uix","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-11-08T12:55:54.910841-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"bd-be7a","title":"Create npm package structure with package.json","description":"Set up initial npm package structure for @beads/bd:

## Files to create
- npm/package.json - Package metadata, dependencies, scripts
- npm/bin/bd - CLI wrapper script that invokes native binary
- npm/.gitignore - Ignore downloaded binaries
- npm/README.md - Installation and usage instructions

## package.json structure
- Name: @beads/bd (scoped package)
- Main: index.js (exports binary path)
- Bin: bin/bd (CLI entry point)
- Scripts: postinstall (download binary)
- Keywords: issue-tracker, cli, beads, bd
- License: MIT

## Bin wrapper
Simple Node.js script that:
- Spawns native binary with child_process.spawn
- Passes through all arguments and stdio
- Exits with binary's exit code","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-11-02T23:39:47.416779-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-03T10:31:45.381258-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-03T10:31:45.381258-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-be7a","depends_on_id":"bd-febc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-11-02T23:40:32.923859-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
